programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Jackson experiences a severe, and most illuminating, cat attack at the claws of a troubled cat named May; the Cat Daddy must help a nervous cat guardian move her two very feral cats to Canada.

programme.desc: A pit bull puppy learns to walk; Chinese crested puppies investigate a turtle; a newborn collie overcomes her shyness.
